title: taraxacum vexatum
intro: Taraxacum vexatum, commonly known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is a close relative of the more well-known common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale) and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum vexatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. Taraxacum vexatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
